title: Add Tracking
description: Paste article content or URLs, AI auto-analyzes and creates tracking records

wizard.inputDescription: Paste article content or URLs for automatic investment analysis
wizard.completeDescription: Your content has been processed successfully
wizard.importStarted: Import started — you can continue browsing while it processes

inputCard.placeholder: Paste article content or URLs (separate multiple URLs with semicolons or new lines)...

tips.hint: Supports text or Twitter / X / YouTube URLs — AI will auto-identify KOL, tickers and sentiment. Supported markets: US, Taiwan, Crypto

detection.modeUrls: Detected URLs — will import as published posts
detection.modeText: Text detected — will create as draft for review
detection.modeProfile: Detected KOL profile — will discover and scrape posts
detection.unsupportedUrl: Some URLs are from unsupported platforms (only Twitter/X and YouTube are supported)

warnings.noTickersIdentified: No investment targets identified — this article may not be investment-related
warnings.noTickersIdentifiedHint: You can manually add tickers in the draft editor before publishing

urlImport.sectionDescription: Paste Twitter/X or YouTube URLs to directly import as published posts

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of your KOL portfolio, win rates, and recent activity

kols.title: KOLs
kols.description: Explore performance of the KOLs you're tracking
kols.empty: No KOLs yet — track your first one above

stocks.title: Stocks
stocks.description: Explore what people are saying about each ticker
stocks.empty: No stocks yet — they appear as you add tracked posts

errors.unsupportedUrl: This URL platform is not supported, please paste article content instead
errors.aiQuotaExceeded: AI analysis quota exhausted, please try again next week
errors.fetchFailed: Failed to fetch URL content, please check the URL
